成功协调 **3名新员工** 于 **2026年3月30日（下周一）** 入职，已完成通知发送、培训安排及待办跟踪。

---

|------|------|------|----------|----------|------|

| 刘小婷 | 市场部 | 市场专员 | 2026-03-30 | MacBook Air ❌ 缺货 | 经理：张伟 (zhangwei_mkt@) |

March 9)

| Time | Activity | Attendees |
|------|----------|-----------|
| 09:00 | HR Reception | All 3 new employees |
| 10:00-12:00 | **Onboarding Training** | All 3 new employees (Managers available ✅) |
| 14:00 | Department Introduction | Individual departments |
| After 14:00 | IT Equipment Pickup | Individual |

*All department managers confirmed available during training hours.*

---

### 📝 Follow-up Todo Items Created

1. **Prepare IT equipment for Xiaoming Wang** (Due: March 8) - High Priority
2. **Prepare IT equipment for Xiaoting Liu** (Due: March 8) - High Priority *(Note: MacBook Air shortage)*
3. **Prepare IT equipment for Haoran Chen** (Due: March 8) - High Priority
4. **Coordinate security clearance for Haoran Chen** (Due: March 9) - High Priority
5. **Schedule onboarding training session** (Due: March 8) - Medium Priority *(Book training room)*

---

### ⚠️ Risk Alerts

| Risk ID | Level | Description | Mitigation |
|---------|-------|-------------|------------|
| R1 | 🔴 High | **MacBook Air shortage** - Xiaoting Liu needs temp laptop | Provide temporary equipment on Day 1, swap on 3/10 |
| R2 | 🔴 High | **Data dept no manager** - Notification saved as draft | HR to coordinate directly with Yang Liu |
| R3 | 🟡 Medium | **Security clearance required** for Haoran Chen | Contact Security Manager (Zhao Qiang) before database access |
| R4 | 🟡 Medium | **Date discrepancy** - March 9 is in the past (today is March 24) | Clarify actual start date with HR |

---

### 📌 Key Contacts

| Role | Name | Email |
|------|------|-------|
| HR Director | Fang Wang | wangfang@company.com |
| Eng Manager | Zhang Wei | zhangwei_eng@company.com |
| Mkt Manager | Zhang Wei | zhangwei_mkt@company.com |
| Data Contact | Yang Liu | liuyang@company.com |
| Security Manager | Zhao Qiang | zhaoqiang@company.com |
| IT Support Lead | Jing Chen | chenjing@company.com |

---

2. **Data Department - No Manager (Haoran Chen)**

   - **Action**: HR Director Fang Wang will coordinate directly

3. **Security Clearance Required (Haoran Chen)**
   - Database access pending 1-2 day clearance
   - **Action**: Contact Security Manager Qiang Zhao (zhaoqiang@company.com)
